[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000100101 3
1 001010110 4
2 111100001 5
3 010101001 4
4 110000011 4
5 101011011 6
6 110001011 5
7 011111010 6
